title: Shopping Cart Management

use_cases.name: Add Product to Cart
use_cases.description: Customer adds a product by pid+pqty params. Checks stock availability. Updates cart quantity or caps at available stock.

use_cases.name: Update Cart Quantity
use_cases.description: Customer sets new quantity for a product in cart via pid+pqty params. Caps at available stock if needed.

use_cases.name: Remove Product from Cart
use_cases.description: Decrements product quantity by 1. Deletes cart entry when quantity reaches 0.
use_cases.triggered_by: AddtoCart when new total == old cart quantity (toggle-off behavior)

use_cases.name: Remove Single Product Entry
use_cases.description: Directly deletes the cart row for a userId+prodId combination regardless of quantity.

use_cases.name: View Cart Items
use_cases.description: Returns List<CartBean> for all products in the customer's cart.

use_cases.name: Get Cart Count
use_cases.description: Returns total sum of all item quantities in the customer's cart.

use_cases.name: Register Demand for Out-of-Stock Product
use_cases.description: <<extend>> use case. Triggered by AddtoCart or UpdateToCart when requested qty exceeds available stock. Records demand so customer is notified by email when product is restocked.

use_cases.name: Check Product Availability
use_cases.description: <<include>> use case. Fetches ProductBean to compare available stock vs. requested quantity before cart operations.

use_cases.name: Validate Customer Session
use_cases.description: <<include>> use case. Verifies session attributes (username, password, usertype=customer). Redirects to login.jsp on failure.

key_relationships: Add Product to Cart <<include>> Validate Customer Session
Add Product to Cart <<include>> Check Product Availability
Add Product to Cart <<extend>> Register Demand for Out-of-Stock Product
Update Cart Quantity <<include>> Validate Customer Session
Update Cart Quantity <<include>> Check Product Availability
Update Cart Quantity <<extend>> Register Demand for Out-of-Stock Product
business_rules: Only authenticated customers (usertype=customer) can add to cart
addProductToCart accumulates qty on top of existing cart quantity
When requested qty > available stock, cart is capped at available qty and excess demand is registered
removeProductFromCart decrements by 1; deletes row when quantity hits 0
updateProductToCart inserts a new row if product not already in cart (qty > 0)
updateProductToCart deletes cart row when qty == 0
Demand registration triggers an email notification promise when stock is replenished
